fields.description:
## Context
Java is entirely unsupported: detect-stack.sh has no Java detection, Java projects fall through to unknown routing and receive no test/lint/format gates, no kudos triggers, no security scan, and no CI skeleton support. This epic adds Java as a first-class language: detect-stack.sh detection (Maven/Gradle with wrapper preference), onboarding Java branch, commands.* routing, gate-2d/gate-2b Java support, project-detect.sh CI pattern recognition, plus stretch deliverables (commands.security OWASP scan and architect-foundation scaffolding).

Core tier (sprint-blocking): SCs 1-3, 6, 7. Stretch (not required for epic closure): SCs 4, 5.

## Success Criteria
- detect-stack.sh adds java-maven (pom.xml at root) and java-gradle (build.gradle at root) as separate stack values; CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md stack accepted values list updated to include both; java-maven takes priority when both present; Java detection below Python/Rust/Go/Node/Ruby; scripts treating both as equivalent (gate-2b, gate-2d, project-detect) vs. differently (commands.* writes, wrapper detection) documented via equivalence contract
- onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b updated with Java branch writing commands.test_runner, commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check; wrapper detection (root-only): mvnw present -> ./mvnw test; pom.xml without mvnw -> mvn test; gradlew present -> ./gradlew test; build.gradle without gradlew -> gradle test
- commands.lint = mvn checkstyle:check, commands.format_check = mvn spotless:check, commands.format = mvn spotless:apply for Java stacks
- [STRETCH] commands.security config key added to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md; validate.sh emits [DSO WARN] commands.security not configured with exit 0 when absent; Java defaults: mvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check -DfailBuildOnCVSS=7 (Maven), ./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze (Gradle)
- [STRETCH] architect-foundation Phase 3 Enforcer Setup: checkstyle.xml using Google Java Style, maven-checkstyle-plugin v3.3.1 + spotless-maven-plugin v2.43.0 in pom.xml with executions bound to validate phase; mvn validate passes after scaffolding
- gate-2d-dependency-check.sh adds Java import statement extraction; gate-2b-blast-radius.sh adds Java fan-in patterns (import, class instantiation) as bash array elements (not eval)
- project-detect.sh recognizes mvn test and ./gradlew test patterns in GitHub Actions YAML
- Validation: grep commands.test_runner .claude/dso-config.conf returns mvn test after onboarding Maven project; grep 'java-maven|java-gradle' CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md returns both entries

## Dependencies
- Epic A (87e9-0bc8): commands.test_runner routing must exist before Epic F writes Maven/Gradle defaults; onboarding config-write path must be established
- Epic B (3818-310d): commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check must exist; gate-2d/gate-2b structure lands first (SC6 is additive Java-only entries)
- Epic C (co-deployment only, not blocking): once both Epic C and Epic F merge, T7/T13/T4 automatically support Java via lizard/jscpd
- Epic E (not blocking): SC5 is self-contained architect-foundation Phase 3 addition; no Epic E deliverable required for any Epic F story

## Approach
Add Java detection to detect-stack.sh (java-maven and java-gradle stack values). Update onboarding SKILL.md with a Java branch in the config-write phase. Add Java defaults to the commands.* routing table. Extend gate-2d and gate-2b with Java patterns. Add project-detect.sh CI pattern recognition. Stretch: add commands.security and architect-foundation scaffolding templates.

## Research Findings
- Build tool conventions: Maven uses pom.xml at project root; Gradle uses build.gradle (Groovy DSL) or build.gradle.kts (Kotlin DSL); wrapper scripts mvnw/gradlew are standard conventional invocation entry points
- Checkstyle: Google Java Style is the de-facto pre-built config; maven-checkstyle-plugin v3.3.1 binds to the `validate` phase; spotless-maven-plugin v2.43.0 is the current stable version for formatting enforcement
- OWASP dependency-check: Maven via `mvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check -DfailBuildOnCVSS=7`; Gradle via `./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze`; CVSS ≥ 7 threshold matches NIST High severity cutoff
- Detection ordering: Java placed below Python/Rust/Go/Node/Ruby in detect-stack.sh per existing first-match-wins convention
- Equivalence contract: scripts treat java-maven and java-gradle as equivalent for test-execution routing (gate-2b, gate-2d, project-detect) but differently for commands.* writes and wrapper detection — contract is machine-readable for downstream scripts

## Scenario Analysis
- Both pom.xml and build.gradle present at root (medium, detection): java-maven wins per explicit contract; equivalence contract documents which gates treat them as equivalent vs. differently — prevents silent double-routing
- Multi-module Maven project (medium, detection): subdirectory pom.xml files not at root are ignored by stack detection; wrapper detection is root-only; submodule gates inherit root stack value
- Gradle Kotlin DSL build.gradle.kts (medium, scope): detection must include .kts extension or silently skip Kotlin-DSL-only projects; documented behavior required in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- Missing wrapper, system-wide mvn/gradle (low, deployment): fallback to unwrapped invocation (mvn test / gradle test); documented as acceptable; wrapper-preferred-when-present is the contract
- commands.security key absent (high, configuration, stretch): [DSO WARN] emitted with exit 0; validate.sh does not block — per stretch SC
- Checkstyle/spotless plugin version drift (medium, maintenance): plugin versions pinned in scaffolded pom.xml (v3.3.1 / v2.43.0); upgrades require doc update and architect-foundation template refresh
- gate-2b/gate-2d bash array pattern injection (low, security): Java fan-in patterns added as bash array elements (not eval); standard pattern per existing gates — guards against shell injection
- project-detect.sh false-positive on commented-out mvn/gradle lines in workflow YAML (low, correctness): regex anchored to active `run:` keys, not YAML comments (#)

## Risk Register (from preplanning)
- Maintainability (7bc4-3941): Equivalence contract must be machine-readable for gate-2d/gate-2b to reference
- Reliability (c140-82c5): Wrapper detection root-only; check pom.xml/build.gradle root files only
- Testing (c140-82c5): Validation (grep commands.test_runner = mvn test) requires Maven fixture

### Planning Intelligence Log

- **Web research (Step 2.6)**: triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: external integration (Maven, Gradle, Checkstyle, Spotless, OWASP dependency-check CLIs), novel pattern (stack-detection equivalence contract)
- **Scenario analysis (Step 2.75)**: triggered
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 8
- **Practitioner-requested additional cycles**: none
- **Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0)**: not triggered
- **Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5)**: not triggered
- **LLM-instruction signal (Step 5)**: not triggered
- **Scale context (Step 0)**: small scale (default) — per-project stack detection, per-commit gate invocation; not volume-sensitive
